text:
Large Rock (大きな岩, Ōkina Iwa) is a card found in the Greed Island game. This is a standard card that can be obtained by the player. These cards can be placed in the player's "Free Slots".
__NOTOC__

Summary

This is a big rock. It can be of any quality, material density and size.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.25008 :: 大きな岩 
大きな岩 押しつぶされると ただでは済まない
|-
![Eng]
|No.25008 :: Large Rock 
A large rock. If one gets crushed underneath it they will not get away unscathed. 
|}
